mano_cua.result_summary: Script Lab编辑器编译失败，TypeScript类型错误TS2322导致Failed to compile。错误位于utilities.ts，CompletionItemKind provider签名不匹配。编辑器完全无法加载，粘贴操作稳定性无法测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All three Script Lab tabs at port 3000 are showing the same "Failed to compile" error. The application at https://localhost:3000 is completely broken due to a build-time TypeScript compilation error in /packages/editor/src/pages/Editor/store/editor/utilities.ts. Error: TS2322 provideCompletionItems function type signature mismatch.
